I HAVE NOTICED THAT IT IS SIMPLY NOT POSSIBLE TO ADJUST THE DRIVER-SIDE REARVIEW MIRROR OUTWARD ENOUGH TO BE ABLE TO PROPERLY SEE VEHICLES WHICH COULD BE IN MY SIDE BLIND SPOTS, AND THIS FEELS INCREDIBLY UNSAFE. I'M HAPPY THAT THE CAR HAS BLIND SPOT DETECTORS ON THE MIRRORS, BUT

narrative.headline: What 2017 Subaru Impreza owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 125 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Exterior Lighting (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
